_note: Funnel-aware posting schedule. TOFU content early in the week when energy is highest. MOFU mid-week. BOFU (email, direct) end of week.

monday.note: Monday awareness post anchors the week

tuesday.content_type: thread — one strong idea with numbered value points
tuesday.note: Tuesday threads perform well — audience active after Monday catch-up

wednesday.content_type: credibility — how-to, insight, contrarian take with depth
wednesday.note: Mid-week for depth content when audience has more time to read

thursday.content_type: value post — story format, purely helpful, no self-promotion first
thursday.note: HUMAN POSTS ONLY — AMAE writes draft, founder posts manually

friday.note: Newsletter: HUMAN SENDS. Quora: HUMAN POSTS.

funnel_targets._note: If TOFU drops below 40%, growth stalls. Funnel-router.js checks this and flags imbalances.
